race.comment: Tricky race to kick off the card with many of these babies facing the starter for the first time. Of the raced brigade DOLLY BOOM (7) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing in both starts to date and strikes a very winnable contest here. Gets the reliable Gollan/Lang combination and should be right there when the whips are cracking. HOME TOMURRA (1) hit the frame in town on debut and is sure to have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience. Looms as the main danger with natural improvement. The well-related SAINT VIN ROUGE (4) (half to G2 winner and G1 placed Madam Rouge) is facing the starter for the first time but has shown ability at the trials and should be kept very safe. WITHOUT SURRENDER (6) will have come on with that first-up placing in the locker and looks one for the multiples. KAVA EXPRESS (8) next in line from the astute stable.
